race.comment: TOMATO TOASTIE (9) was excellent first-up in the PJ Bell on a soft track over 1200m then ran into plenty of bother in a forgive run in the James Carr over this trip at Randwick last time. Lightly raced filly who finds the perfect race to open her black-type account. BENGAL DIAMOND (14) missed the kick and went back to last before unleashing late but just missing when fresh from a spell over 1200m at Eagle Farm last time out. Handles this going and will be tough to stop over the longer journey today. TEN DEEP (13) continued her fine run of form when successful in a Class 6 over this distance at Eagle Farm recently. Needs luck from a horror draw but if it comes she is right in contention. SHE'S GOT PIZZAZZ (6) disappointed in the Hareeba at Mornington last start but is more adept on tracks with give so she deserves another chance. SUNSET DREAMING (7) will strip fitter second-up and an extra 200m today is to her advantage.
